rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px solid border (#2A2A2A), zero border-radius. On hover: border-color changes to #E10600, subtle red inner shadow.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Only used for sticky header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/70 with 1px border-b border-white/10.
surface_strategies.glow_effects: Buttons and active states use drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(225,6,0,0.5)].

buttons.primary: bg-[#E10600] text-white hover:bg-[#FF1E18] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(225,6,0,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(225,6,0,0.7)] px-8 py-4 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black uppercase font-bold tracking-wider transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none
buttons.floating_mobile: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#E10600] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(225,6,0,0.6)] animate-pulse flex md:hidden

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white focus:border-[#E10600] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E10600] rounded-none px-4 py-3 transition-colors
inputs.label: text-sm text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2 block

service_cards.layout: Grid of 4 (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4), gap-6 for distinct cards.
service_cards.style: group relative bg-[#121212] border border-[#2A2A2A] p-8 hover:border-[#E10600] transition-all duration-300
service_cards.hover_effect: Icon turns red, subtle red gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent to-[#E10600]/5) fades in, card lifts slightly (-translate-y-1).

loading_screen.style: Fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-[#0A0A0A] flex items-center justify-center
loading_screen.animation: Logo pulse with red glowing aura, red progress bar at bottom.

header.layout: Sticky, top-0, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-b border-white/5
header.elements: Logo left, Nav center (hidden on mobile), CTA right 'Book Now'

hero.layout: Relative h-[90vh] min-h-[600px] flex items-center pt-20
hero.background: Hero image with dark overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/80 to-transparent
hero.content: Left aligned. Overline 'Precision Mechanics'. H1 '24/7 Mobile Mechanic Service You Can Trust'. Subtext with flex row of services separated by red dots or pipes. Button group (Primary Book Now, Secondary Call Now). Phone number with icon.

about.layout: Grid 1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center py-24 bg-[#121212] relative overflow-hidden
about.visuals: Right side: Mechanic image with a metallic grid overlay or red accent border.
about.content: Left side: 'We Come To You'. Bullet points with check icons (24/7, Certified, Fast Response).

booking_system.background: Abstract red glow orb in background (blur-3xl opacity-20)
booking_system.form: 2-column grid for inputs (Name, Phone, Email, Vehicle), full width for Service dropdown, Date/Time, Issue textarea. Submit button full width glowing red.

contact.layout: Grid 1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-t border-[#2A2A2A]
contact.left: Massive click-to-call number text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-gray-500 hover:to-[#E10600] transition-all. 'Available 24/7'.
contact.right: Map placeholder (use dark mechanic image) with red location pin.

google_search_cta.layout: py-16 bg-[#121212] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center
google_search_cta.element: Mock Google search bar containing 'M&A Mobile Mechanic', typing cursor animation, surrounded by 5-star review trust badges.

animations_and_interactions.reveal: Fade up and staggered entrance for lists and grids using Framer Motion.
animations_and_interactions.hover_links: Text color changes to white, red underline expands from left to right.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid='...' (e.g., 'hero-book-button', 'contact-phone-link', 'booking-form-submit').
